'''shatholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whaitsiid|whaitsiid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whaitsiid|whaitsiid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shatholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shætheleth|shætheleth]] || [[word:shæthelej|shæthelej]] || [[word:shæthelesh|shæthelesh]] || [[word:shæthele|shæthele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathotholoth|shathotholoth]] || [[word:shathotholoj|shathotholoj]] || [[word:shathotholosh|shathotholosh]] || [[word:shathotholo|shathotholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shatholoth|shatholoth]] || [[word:shatholoj|shatholoj]] || [[word:shatholosh|shatholosh]] || [[word:shatholo|shatholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathofloth|shathofloth]] || [[word:shathofloj|shathofloj]] || [[word:shathoflosh|shathoflosh]] || [[word:shathoflof|shathoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shatholotho|shatholotho]] || [[word:shatholojo|shatholojo]] || [[word:shatholosho|shatholosho]] || [[word:shatholoko|shatholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shatholoth|shatholoth]] || [[word:shatholoj|shatholoj]] || [[word:shatholosh|shatholosh]] || [[word:shatholo|shatholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shatholothol|shatholothol]] || [[word:shatholojol|shatholojol]] || [[word:shatholoshol|shatholoshol]] || [[word:shatholokol|shatholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shatholothotho|shatholothotho]] || [[word:shatholojojo|shatholojojo]] || [[word:shatholoshosho|shatholoshosho]] || [[word:shatholoko|shatholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shatholothon|shatholothon]] || [[word:shatholojon|shatholojon]] || [[word:shatholoshon|shatholoshon]] || [[word:shatholokon|shatholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shatholothoro|shatholothoro]] || [[word:shatholojoro|shatholojoro]] || [[word:shatholoshoro|shatholoshoro]] || [[word:shatholokoro|shatholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
